name: b2b-robotics-qualifier
description: Classify companies as B2B robotics equipment sellers from free-form descriptions. Output: is_b2b, robotics_equipment_score (1-10), qualified boolean, reasoning.

qualified_accuracy.description: The qualified boolean matches expected. This is the filter decision.

score_accuracy.description: robotics_equipment_score is within +/-1 of expected value.

reasoning_quality.description: Reasoning references specific details from the description, not generic filler.
